ExecutionPacket.purpose: Implement the approved module without architectural drift.

assumptions.assumption-1: List material assumptions accepted as stable context for this execution.

stop-conditions.condition-1: Conditions that halt execution of this step.

retry-budget.strategy: Bounded one-shot same-session repair then fail closed.

checkpoint-fields.field-1: assumptions - material assumptions accepted as stable
checkpoint-fields.field-2: commands - commands executed with exit codes
checkpoint-fields.field-3: evidence - key findings or test results

ExecutionPacket.contract-excerpt: Planned module contract excerpt goes here.
ExecutionPacket.graph-entry-excerpt: Knowledge graph entry excerpt goes here.

dependency-contract-summaries.dependency-1: Structured logger interface with stable marker fields.

notes.note-1: Workers should only read more context when the packet is insufficient.

assumptions.assumption-1: List material assumptions accepted as stable context.

commands-run.command-1: List commands executed with exit codes.

evidence.evidence-1: Key findings, log markers, or test results.

CheckpointReport.current-unknown: What is not yet known or confirmed.
CheckpointReport.next-action: The safest next step based on current evidence.

stop-conditions.condition-1: Conditions that would stop the current step.

notes.note-1: Only list graph facts that really changed in the code.

required-trace-assertions.assertion-1: Failure path must not emit BLOCK_PERSIST_RESULT.

wave-follow-up.item-1: Run merged-surface integration check for the logger adapter.

phase-follow-up.item-1: Run the broader regression suite before marking the phase done.

FailurePacket.scenario: Primary success path fails on valid input.
FailurePacket.suggested-next-action: Read the contract, inspect the divergent block, and apply the smallest safe fix.
